top_signals.title: Robinhood L2 sparks ETH optimism, Saylor 'muddies waters.' Hodler's Digest, July 5-12, 2026
top_signals.summary: Even Ethereum's critics believe Robinhood Chain is bullish for ETH. Nigel Farage and Donald Trump become embroiled in crypto related scandals, and more.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Main Committee Meeting – 26 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England chairs the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC), which is a forum for discussion of the wholesale foreign exchange market. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Legal Sub Committee Meeting – 17 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England provides the Secretariat to the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC) Legal Sub-Committee. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin is nearing a power law support line Fidelity has tracked since 2015
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Typhoon Bavi batters eastern China, threatens days of heavy rain
top_signals.summary: Bavi struck Zhejiang's coastal city of Yuhuan at around 11:20 p.m. on Saturday before ​making a second landfall in Yueqing, part of the city of Wenzhou, at around midnight.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Non-executive director reappointment at GAD
top_signals.summary: The Government Actuary’s Department (GAD) announces the reappointment of Liz Thornhill as non-executive director.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix rises 13% in Nasdaq debut. Chairman tells CNBC 'demand is enormous' - CNBC
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix rises 13% in Nasdaq debut. Chairman tells CNBC 'demand is enormous'  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
